description: User scrolls down the list of opportunities to view more available sessions.
frame_description: The user is viewing a list of research opportunities on a mobile-styled web interface.

description: Cursor pauses over the 'AI Interview' opportunity card while the user reads the details.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over a pink card labeled 'AI Interview' worth $60.

description: User scrolls up to revisit previous items in the list.
frame_description: The list content moves downwards as the user scrolls up.

description: Cursor lingers over the 'Diary Study' card.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over an orange card for a 'Diary Study' worth $40.

description: User scrolls down further into the list.
frame_description: The user scrolls past the Diary Study and AI Interview cards.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'AI Interview' card again.
frame_description: The cursor returns to the AI Interview card at the bottom of the visible list.

description: User scrolls up to the top of the 'Sessions to schedule' section.
frame_description: The list scrolls back up to show the 'Video Call' and 'In Person' cards.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'In Person' session card.
frame_description: The cursor is over a light pink card for an 'In Person' session.
The list moves up as the user scrolls down.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'In Person' card again.
frame_description: The cursor remains on the 'In Person' card after the scroll.

description: User scrolls up and down the list, seemingly comparing options.
frame_description: The user performs several small scrolls to look at different cards in the list.

description: User clicks on the 'Askable Sessions' browser tab to switch pages.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the top of the browser and clicks the second tab.

description: The browser switches to the 'Askable Sessions' page.
frame_description: The screen changes from the opportunity list to a dark interface with a loading message.

description: Text instructions appear dynamically on the screen, simulating a conversation or automated prompt.
frame_description: White text appears word-by-word on the black background, asking the user about their thoughts on the 15-minute lunch break.

description: User clicks back on the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' browser tab.
frame_description: The cursor moves back to the first browser tab and clicks it.

description: The browser switches back to the opportunity list page.
frame_description: The screen returns to the list of research opportunities.
